tasks.title: Initialise Next.js 14 project with TypeScript + Tailwind CSS
tasks.description: Create Next.js 14 app with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, App Router, src directory
acceptance_criteria: npx next dev starts without errors

tasks.title: Configure ESLint and Prettier
tasks.description: Set up ESLint with Next.js recommended config and Prettier
acceptance_criteria: npx eslint src/ runs without errors

tasks.title: Set up Sanity project and connect to Next.js
tasks.description: Install next-sanity, create client, configure image URL builder
acceptance_criteria: Image URL builder generates valid URLs

tasks.title: Configure environment variables structure
tasks.description: Create .env.example with all required variables, add .env.local to .gitignore

tasks.title: Set up base layout with Header, Footer, WhatsApp float
tasks.description: Create root layout with Cormorant Garamond + DM Sans fonts, Header with nav, Footer, WhatsAppFloat component
acceptance_criteria: Header renders with logo and navigation links

tasks.title: Create product schema
tasks.description: Full product document schema with all fields from PRD
acceptance_criteria: Product schema validates in Sanity Studio

tasks.title: Create category schema
tasks.description: Category document schema with name, slug, description, image
acceptance_criteria: Category schema validates in Sanity Studio

tasks.title: Create showroom schema
tasks.description: Showroom document schema with address, hours, gallery
acceptance_criteria: Showroom schema validates in Sanity Studio

tasks.title: Create siteSettings schema
tasks.description: Global settings for SEO defaults, WhatsApp number, etc.

tasks.title: Seed CMS with sample products
tasks.description: Create seed script with 5 products per category (35 total)
acceptance_criteria: Seed script generates 35 products across 7 categories

tasks.title: Homepage
tasks.description: Hero banner + Featured Products + Category Highlights + Trust Indicators + Showroom Teaser

tasks.title: Product catalog page with filters
tasks.description: Product grid with category sidebar filter, sort, pagination
acceptance_criteria: Products display in grid (2 col mobile, 3-4 desktop)

tasks.title: Product detail page
tasks.description: Gallery + specs table + WhatsApp CTA + related products + breadcrumbs

tasks.title: Category landing pages
tasks.description: Dynamic [slug] route for category pages
acceptance_criteria: Category pages load with filtered products

tasks.title: Showroom page
tasks.description: Map embed + gallery + opening hours
acceptance_criteria: Showroom page renders with map, hours, gallery

tasks.title: Contact page
tasks.description: Contact form + WhatsApp link + business hours

tasks.title: Search results page
tasks.description: Search results with filters and zero-results state

tasks.title: GET /api/products with filter params
tasks.description: API route to fetch products with optional category, material, thickness filters

tasks.title: POST /api/contact with validation
tasks.description: Contact form API with Zod validation for Nigerian phone numbers

tasks.title: Product search functionality
tasks.description: Client-side search bar with server-side GROQ search
acceptance_criteria: Search returns relevant products by name/description/material

tasks.title: Product filter system
tasks.description: Filter by thickness, material, finish, price range

tasks.title: WhatsApp deep-link generator
tasks.description: Utility to generate pre-filled WhatsApp messages for each product
acceptance_criteria: WhatsApp links open with correct pre-filled message

tasks.title: Image gallery with lightbox
tasks.description: Product image gallery with zoom/lightbox on click

tasks.title: Related products component
tasks.description: Show 4 related products from same category on product detail page
acceptance_criteria: 4 related products from same category displayed

tasks.title: Dynamic metadata for all pages
tasks.description: generateMetadata() on every page with unique title/description
acceptance_criteria: Every page has unique title and description

tasks.title: JSON-LD structured data
tasks.description: Product, LocalBusiness, BreadcrumbList schema.org data
acceptance_criteria: Valid JSON-LD on product and contact pages

tasks.title: Sitemap.xml generation
tasks.description: Dynamic sitemap with all product and category URLs
acceptance_criteria: /sitemap.xml returns valid XML with all URLs

tasks.title: robots.txt
tasks.description: robots.txt allowing crawling with sitemap reference

tasks.title: Image optimization
tasks.description: next/image everywhere with WebP and lazy loading
acceptance_criteria: All images use next/image with proper alt text

tasks.title: Google Analytics integration
tasks.description: GA4 with custom events for WhatsApp clicks and product views

tasks.title: Unit tests for utility functions
tasks.description: Test WhatsApp link builder, price formatter, image URL builder
acceptance_criteria: All utility functions have passing tests

tasks.title: Component tests
tasks.description: Test ProductCard, ProductFilter, SearchBar, WhatsAppFloat
acceptance_criteria: All key components have passing tests

tasks.title: Integration tests for API routes
tasks.description: Test GET /api/products and POST /api/contact
acceptance_criteria: API routes handle valid and invalid inputs

tasks.title: E2E tests
tasks.description: Playwright tests for homepage, product browse, contact form
acceptance_criteria: All E2E tests pass on mobile and desktop

tasks.title: GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow
tasks.description: deploy.yml with quality gate, deploy, E2E, notify jobs
acceptance_criteria: Workflow runs on push to main

tasks.title: Vercel configuration
tasks.description: vercel.json with headers, redirects, rewrites

tasks.title: Environment variables setup
tasks.description: .env.example with all required variables documented

tasks.title: Custom domain setup instructions
tasks.description: DNS configuration for modishstandard.com on Vercel

tasks.title: Bootstrap and seed scripts
tasks.description: bootstrap.sh for one-command setup, seed-cms.ts for sample data
acceptance_criteria: bootstrap.sh runs successfully on fresh clone
